case_title: VICTOR GRANADES ET AL VS. FASTRAK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,850.00 FILED BY GRANADES, VICTOR ZAMORA, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FASTRAK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS VICTOR GRANADES AND ALLAN ZAMORA APPEARED. DEFENDANT FASTRAK APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MANUEL ESPIRITU, BATA FASTRAK PROGRAM COORDINATOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANADES, VICTOR ZAMORA, ALLAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FASTRAK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
